query:
SELECT p.id as product_id, p.name, p.imageUrl, oi.id as order_item_id, oi.orderId
FROM products p
JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.productId = p.id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.variantId = pv.id
WHERE p.imageUrl IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 5;
command:
